title: prunus ilicifolia
intro: Prunus ilicifolia, also known as the evergreen holly oak or California holly, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. Its leaves, bark, and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus ilicifolia include its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve pain and fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
